name: Narvar Post-Purchase Customer Experience API
what_it_does: Narvar enterprise post-purchase customer experience REST API for order tracking, delivery communications, and returns management for retail and e-commerce brands. Enables AI agents to manage multi-carrier order tracking and status normalization for unified post-purchase visibility automation, handle proactive delivery notification and exception communication for customer delivery experience automation, access branded tracking page delivery for retailer-branded post-purchase experience, retrieve returns initiation and label generation for self-service return automation, manage return drop-off and carrier return logistics for return experience optimization, handle order promise and delivery date display for pre-purchase and post-purchase ETA communication, access consumer sentiment collection and delivery feedback for post-purchase analytics, retrieve carrier performance analytics for logistics KPI reporting, manage returns exchange and instant refund workflow for return conversion automation, and integrate Narvar with Salesforce Commerce Cloud, SAP, Oracle, and major carrier networks for enterprise retail post-purchase lifecycle.
use_cases: Tracking orders from enterprise retail CX agents
Communicating delivery exceptions from proactive CS agents
Processing returns from self-service returns agents
Displaying delivery ETAs from commerce platform agents
not_for: Small DTC brands without enterprise volumes (use AfterShip or Route)
Real-time freight and LTL shipment management
best_when: An enterprise retailer (mid-market to large) wanting AI agents to automate branded post-purchase tracking, proactive delivery communications, self-service returns, and carrier performance analytics at scale across Narvar's carrier network.
avoid_when: CARRIER DATA FRESHNESS AND NOTIFICATION TIMING ACCURACY: Narvar delivery notifications are triggered by carrier checkpoint data; carrier data feeds have variable freshness (near-real-time to 4+ hours); automated customer notifications based on stale carrier data create incorrect customer delivery expectations and CS inquiry spikes. RETURNS CARRIER PRE-PAID LABEL COST EXPOSURE: Automated returns label generation via Narvar for non-defective returns creates pre-paid shipping cost for retailer; automated returns initiation without return reason validation or item value threshold gate creates uncontrolled returns shipping cost exposure. GDPR EU CONSUMER TRACKING DATA: Narvar tracking page and notification systems collect EU consumer behavioral data (page views, notification opens, delivery preferences); automated post-purchase data collection for EU consumers requires GDPR-compliant cookie consent and data processing disclosure.

auth.notes: Narvar uses API key and OAuth authentication. REST API with JSON. San Mateo, California HQ. Founded 2012 by Amit Sharma. Private ($90M+ raised, Accel, Battery Ventures, Bond Capital, TPG). 1,500+ retail brand customers. 175M+ consumers reached. Enterprise retail focus: Levi's, Sephora, The North Face, Patagonia customers. Returns management, tracking, and post-purchase CX. Competes with AfterShip, Parcel Perform, and Loop Returns for enterprise retail post-purchase.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription by order volume
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription by order volume; tracking, returns, and notify modules priced separately; enterprise custom pricing
pricing.notes: San Mateo CA. Private ($90M+). Founded 2012. Accel, Battery, Bond, TPG investors. 1,500+ retail brands. 175M+ consumers. Annual subscription by order volume.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; bulk order upload and tracking queries throttled; webhooks for tracking events and return status

known_agent_gotchas: CARRIER CHECKPOINT LAG IN NOTIFICATION TRIGGERS: Narvar notification triggers depend on carrier data freshness; carrier feeds vary from near-real-time to 4-6 hours delay; automated proactive delivery notifications triggered too early on stale carrier data create incorrect customer messaging; implement carrier data timestamp check before notification dispatch

RETURNS LABEL COST GATE FOR NON-DEFECTIVE RETURNS: Automated return label generation creates retailer-paid shipping liability; implement return reason classification and item value threshold before automated label issuance; automated returns without cost gate create uncontrolled reverse logistics shipping expense

EXCHANGE VS REFUND RETURN DISPOSITION ROUTING: Narvar supports returns exchange, instant refund, and standard refund flows; automated return routing must apply retailer-defined business rules for disposition eligibility; automated instant refund issuance without fraud or return history validation creates return abuse exposure

Branded tracking page white-label DNS configuration — Narvar branded tracking pages require custom DNS CNAME configuration per retail brand; automated deployment of Narvar tracking for new brand or domain requires DNS propagation (24-72 hours); factor DNS lead time into post-purchase implementation timeline

Notification channel preference and opt-out compliance — Narvar consumer notification delivery (SMS, email) must respect consumer opt-out preferences; automated notification triggering without opt-out suppression check creates CAN-SPAM and TCPA compliance violation for SMS; implement opt-out list sync before automated notification dispatch

GDPR consumer behavioral data collection consent — Narvar tracking page collects consumer behavioral data (interactions, preferences) subject to GDPR consent requirements for EU consumers; automated post-purchase experience deployment for EU consumers requires cookie consent banner and GDPR-compliant behavioral data processing configuration
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise retail post-purchase. SOC2, GDPR, PCI-DSS. API key/OAuth. US/EU. Consumer tracking, returns, and behavioral data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Retail post-purchase. SOC2, GDPR, PCI-DSS. API key/OAuth. US/EU. Consumer behavioral and return data.
